title: cananga odorata var. odorata
intro: Cananga odorata var. odorata, also known as the ylang-ylang tree or evening star, is a tropical plant native to the Philippines and Indonesia that is prized for its highly fragrant flowers. The medicinal properties of the ylang-ylang plant include its ability to reduce anxiety and stress, promote relaxation, and lower blood pressure due to its high content of linalool and other sesquiterpenes. The health benefits of using ylang-ylang include reducing inflammation, improving sleep quality, and supporting emotional well-being. Ylang-ylang is often used in herbal preparations such as essential oils, perfumes, and skincare products, and can be consumed as a tea or used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
